text: Kliso bedzini bal…Ы ekulu amana buvuћГ…Ф m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bakp…Ы bal…Ы …Фsha as…Ы bagam…Ф kidzo a…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф alo t…ЫћА bakas…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ nanaћА n…Ы Yesu y…Ыinye…Ы m…Ы.
translated: The people of the world were in darkness and did not know God, but God loved them so much that he sent his only Son Jesus Christ to come and save them.
